summary: Iteration 17 backend + frontend validation of auto-detected failure propagations, alert/autonomous heal triggers along propagation paths, and BFS-depth × score-ordered healing sequence optimizer. Backend pytest (20/20) covers: GET /api/healing/active-propagations snapshot shape (enabled, autonomous_heal, interval_sec, stress_pressure_threshold, active, detection_count, last_run_at, recent_history); POST /api/healing/auto-propagation/config disable/re-enable + interval_sec clamp 2->3 and 100->60; POST /api/healing/optimize-sequence with the spec's DB/Cache/Backend payload returns sequence ordered by depth asc (DB depth=0 first) and score desc, candidate_count=3, ordering_rule string, expected_total_sri_gain>=0, each step has node/target_node/action_id/depth/pressure/readiness in [0,1]/score; granularity=bogus -> 400; POST /api/healing/execute-sequence returns one result per step with executed=true (sri_before/after/delta) OR skipped=true with reason ∈ {cooldown, unknown action, missing action_id/target_node}, executed_count and cumulative_sri_delta; empty sequence -> 400, delay_ms=10000 -> 400; heavy-traffic activation: 80 parallel /api/products threads for ~30s reliably populated `active` (5 sources: API/Backend/Cache/Queue/DB), each entry carries source/pressure/yield_exceeded/downstream/max_phi/max_infected/detected_at and (with autonomous_heal=true default) `plan` with sequence/skipped/expected_total_sri_gain/ordering_rule plus optional `healing_executed`; detection_count strictly increases across consecutive snapshots; full regression suite green (topology/schema, fea?granularity=component, auto-dampen-wave, fault-propagation, resilience-debt, trend, metrics/correlation, admin/webhooks/status with admin login, auth/login, products). Frontend Playwright run validates: admin login → System Health tab → ActivePropagationsPanel (data-testid=active-propagations-panel) renders ABOVE the SRI↔Conversion chart (panel top 967 < chart top 1990); both toggles present (auto-prop-enabled-toggle, auto-prop-heal-toggle); toggling enabled OFF fires POST /api/healing/auto-propagation/config {enabled:false}, toggling ON fires {enabled:true}; under browser-side heavy traffic (60 parallel fetch loops to /api/products) the panel rendered 5 propagation cards (active-prop-API, active-prop-Backend, active-prop-Cache, active-prop-Queue, active-prop-DB) each with predicted downstream peaks (e.g. 'Backend peak 0.45 arrives @ 0.5s'), optimized healing plan (plan-<NODE>) with ordered actions+depth+cooldown labels (e.g. queue_drain@Queue d=0, circuit_breaker@Backend d=1 cd 24s, rate_limit@API d=1 cd 9s, cache_flush@Cache d=2 cd 6s), and 'AUTO-HEALED ×1' badge with ΔSRI annotation when autonomous_heal already executed; clicking execute-plan-API fired POST /api/healing/execute-sequence and toast appeared 'Executed 0/4 • Δ SRI +0' (0 executed because all 4 actions were already in cooldown from the autonomous-heal loop — this is the spec-specified skipped/cooldown behavior, not a bug). When detection enabled but no stress, panel shows active-propagations-empty with threshold info.

design_issues.screen: Dashboard / System Health / Active Propagations Panel
issues: Pressure values render as 'pressure=212.828' / 'pressure=66.521' on the cards — these are the raw von_mises_stress aggregate from FEA (which is unbounded), not a 0..1 normalised pressure. Most operators would expect a percentage or a normalised stress (e.g. stress / yield × 100%). Suggest formatting as '21.3× yield' or normalising relative to stress_pressure_threshold so the badge means something at a glance.

Run Plan toast 'Executed 0/4 • Δ SRI +0' is shown after every manual click during high-stress periods because all 4 actions are already on cooldown from the autonomous-heal loop. Consider surfacing per-step cooldown_remaining_seconds in the toast (e.g. 'Skipped 4 (all cooling down 6-45s)') so operators understand WHY nothing executed.

Auto-executed entries show 'ΔSRI -0.0058' in red — negative delta after a healing action is suspicious; either (a) the action genuinely degraded SRI in this tick or (b) baseline SRI was sampled mid-stress so the delta is misattributed. Suggest investigating; if (a), the optimizer's expected_total_sri_gain estimate is unreliable for this action under load.

All 5 services (API/Backend/Cache/Queue/DB) show as active simultaneously under 60 concurrent fetch loops — the threshold of 0.005 is so sensitive that any meaningful traffic trips every node. Default UX would benefit from a higher default (e.g. 0.05) or a 'Sensitivity' slider so the panel doesn't show 'everything is on fire' for normal load.

action_items: (Cosmetic) Format pressure on propagation cards as a normalised value (e.g. multiplier of stress_pressure_threshold or % of yield) instead of raw von_mises_stress.
(Cosmetic) Make Run Plan toast distinguish 'Skipped N (cooldown)' from 'Executed N' — the per-step cooldown_remaining_seconds is already returned by the backend and unused by the UI.

(Investigate) Negative ΔSRI on auto-executed queue_drain — verify whether the SRI sample point is taken at the right instant; the optimizer's expected_total_sri_gain uses |effectiveness| which masks regressions in past history.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 4951 lines — splitting overdue. Recommend backend/healing/auto_propagation.py (AutoPropagationDetector + auto_propagation_loop), backend/healing/sequence_optimizer.py (HealingSequenceOptimizer), backend/routes/healing.py for FastAPI routes.

AutoPropagationConfigRequest.interval_sec is silently clamped server-side (3..60) instead of returning 422 — current contract is fine, but consider Pydantic Field(ge=3, le=60) for self-documentation and OpenAPI clarity.

HealingSequenceOptimizer.optimize uses readiness=0 when action is on full cooldown, which means an action can be in `sequence` with score≈0 and contribute 0 to expected_total_sri_gain. That's mathematically OK but operationally noisy — consider filtering steps with readiness < 0.05 into `skipped` with reason='cooldown' so the UI only shows actionable steps.

auto_propagation_loop calls healing_engine.execute_action inside a sync code path inside the loop's autonomous-heal branch; cumulative SRI deltas during heavy load are NOT recorded into adaptive_healer / correlation tracker as 'optimized_sequence' triggers — they are tagged 'auto_propagation'. Verify CorrelationTracker treats both trigger labels as healing-action annotations.

ActivePropagationsPanel.jsx uses an empty catch block (`/* silent */`) in `load()` which hides legitimate 401/500 errors from the user. Add a dev-only console.warn or a non-blocking toast when consecutive failures > 3.

ActivePropagationsPanel polls every 4s with no AbortController — overlapping requests on slow networks can pile up and racy state updates may flicker checkboxes. Consider canceling in-flight requests on unmount.
auto_propagation_loop sets last_run_at twice per tick (once before the FEA call, once at end) — slightly confusing. Keep only the post-scan timestamp.
test_credentials: admin@freshcart.com / admin123 (source: /app/memory/test_credentials.md). httpOnly cookie auth verified on /api/admin/webhooks/status.
seed_data_creation: None permanent. test_active_populated_under_traffic spins 80 parallel /api/products GETs for up to 30s; in-memory only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://delivery-metrics-hub-1.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration17_active_propagations.py -v` (~25s; the heavy-traffic test alone is ~12-15s with 80 threads). Frontend: login admin → System Health tab → assert active-propagations-panel renders BEFORE conv-correlation-chart, both toggles present; flip auto-prop-enabled-toggle → POST /api/healing/auto-propagation/config {enabled:false} (verified). Use the in-page evaluate trick `for (let i=0;i<60;i++) (async()=>{while(!window.__hammer_stop) try{await fetch('/api/products')}catch(e){}})();` to drive load from the browser without local network bottleneck — within ~12s panel populates 5 active-prop-<NODE> cards. Click any execute-plan-<NODE> → POST /api/healing/execute-sequence + toast 'Executed N/M • Δ SRI ±X'. NOTE: when autonomous_heal=true (default) the autonomous loop already runs the same actions every 8s, so manual Run Plan often shows 'Executed 0/N' with all steps skipped=cooldown — that is correct per the spec ('skips actions on cooldown rather than failing'). To exercise non-cooldown executions, first POST /api/healing/auto-propagation/config {autonomous_heal:false}, wait 60s for cooldowns to clear, then click Run Plan. Iterations 13-16 regressions all green.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failures found. All 20 backend tests passed on first run; all 13 frontend spec items verified. The toast 'Executed 0/4 • Δ SRI +0' observed during the manual Run Plan click is NOT a bug — it is the documented cooldown-skip contract: when autonomous_heal=true and the auto-loop has already executed the optimized actions in the prior 8s tick, all 5 healing actions (cache_flush/connection_pool_reset/queue_drain/circuit_breaker/rate_limit) are on 30-90s cooldown, and execute-sequence correctly returns skipped=true with reason='cooldown' for each step. The 0 executed_count and 0.0 cumulative_sri_delta are the right values.
